title: Addity
description: Adds Various block and item types to the game! Successor to the Additional Bars and Horizontal Panes mods.
body:
# Addity A Minecraft mod that adds many block variations (and features in the future) to the game! This mod is a successor to the Additional Bars and Horizontal Panes mods. ### Why the merge? Both of the mods provide a similar feature, with Horizontal Panes having a similar codebase to the Additional Bars, so it will be easier to maintain it under one project (or two for Fabric version) instead of multiple projects. ### Addity? First plan was to name the mod 'Additional Additions', but the mod with that name already exists, so the other first thing that came to mind was 'Oddity' and with a little word play, I got 'Addity' :) Plan is to port all of my mods into this mod, so the name will eventually make some sense (I hope at least). ### Features #### More Bars block variations
Spoiler ![Wooden Bars Variations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49a6f1f9724ddce7a90f8379dbbe7b53daab7bc4_0.webp) ![Some of the Horizontal Bars Variations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d2bf73de522981f8629a7b68e2a3c838e61bb11_0.webp)
#### Horizontal Glass Panes
Spoiler ![Horizontal Glass Panes Variations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec278db64ae9218ffd23e21a8fff0d83b5e0c0f1_0.webp)
#### Short Fences
Spoiler ![Short Fence Variations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41f33360d04ab8fb7b4a9326b8353cb5d0154276.png)
#### Magic Mirror
Spoiler ![Magic Mirrors in Item Frames](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1029be31bb446562a3059609ad48afcfcb520d81.png)
#### Potion of Nostalgia
Spoiler ![Potion of Nostalgia in Item Frame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8883853fa90cbef43bd34d9f0625e4eec7f91c7e.png)
### Backports? Maybe. This project is a side hobby, so nothing is promised. ## Crafting Check the gallery for crafting of the Magic Mirror Items! **For NeoForge:** Nostalgia Potion is Brewed in the following order: Nether Wart -> Golden Carrot -> Ender Pearl Dust **For Fabric:** Nostalgia Potion is crafted in the crafting table with One Night Vision Potion, and One Ender Pearl Dust
